case_title: HUSEYIN ESER KIRKIZLAR ET AL VS. DEMECE GAREPIS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-06-2015 - CONTINUED PER ORDER OF THE COURT TO APR-03-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH ROBERT COHEN (TITLE: UNPAID REPRESENTATIVE). COURT RULES THAT THE DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE WAS AN ATTORNEY AND COULD NOT REPRESENT THE DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER TODAY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED JAN-26-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GAREPIS, DEMECE (AKA DEMECE GAREPIS-HOLLAND)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,966.67 FILED BY KIRKIZLAR, HUSEYIN ESER ZINS, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT GAREPIS, DEMECE (AKA DEMECE GAREPIS-HOLLAND) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-06-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-03-2015 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
